name: Max Holloway
oneLiner: The volume case: relentless pace, elite quality wins, and one of the longest useful elite windows in the featherweight era.
compareShortCase: Holloway is the volume-and-quality-wins monster: a long elite featherweight run, huge win depth, absurd durability, and enough lightweight context to make him dangerous in almost any comparison.
compareCounter: The case against Holloway is championship separation. Volkanovski beat him three times, and Max has more losses than the cleaner top-tier GOAT cases.
